auth.signupPasswordHint: At least 8 characters and one uppercase letter
auth.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm the change.
auth.forgotPasswordBody: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.resetLinkSent: Check your email — we've sent you a reset link.

authError.title: Invalid link
authError.description: The confirmation link has expired or has already been used. Create a new account to get a fresh one, or sign in if you've already activated yours.

brand.tagline1: We don't make money from your

welcome.slide1Body: You don't match by photos here. AI connects people by real compatibility. Photos unlock after, when a conversation already exists.
welcome.slide2Body: No one can see you until you match. Only the people you connect with can get to know you.
welcome.slide2Sub: Your profile is private. Only your matches can see you.
welcome.slide3Body: No likes here — only connections. Too Match guarantees at least 1 match a day for active participants.
welcome.slide4Body: The more you respond, the more the AI learns. Time is on your side.
welcome.slide4Sub: The more you engage, the better your matches.

intro.subtitle: Just the basics to get started.
intro.wrongIntentionTitle: Then this app is probably not what you're looking for.
intro.wrongIntentionBody: We're here for real connections. If you ever change your mind, come back!

onboarding.step1Subtitle: Tell it in your own words, no filters. It's the only thing your match will see at first.
onboarding.step1Hint: Don't worry about making a good impression. The more you, the better the fit.
onboarding.step1Prompt1: How other people would describe you
onboarding.step1Prompt2: How you are in your day-to-day when you feel comfortable
onboarding.step1Prompt3: What genuinely makes you feel good
onboarding.step1Placeholder: e.g. I'm pretty calm, slow to start but intense once I'm into something, I like listening more than talking…
onboarding.step1TooShort: Can't write {min} characters so the AI can find you someone better? If you can't even do this, what are you going to do when you actually meet your match?
onboarding.intentionLabel: What are you really looking for?
onboarding.infoIntentParejaBody: We're going to give everything so that within 6 months you've found the love of your life. I hope you give everything too.
onboarding.wrongIntentionCasualTitle: This platform is probably not for you.
onboarding.wrongIntentionCasualBody: There are plenty of apps for that. Most people here find a real relationship. We just want you to have the right expectations.
onboarding.infoIntentBuscandoTitle: We never really know what we want until we find it.
onboarding.infoIntentBuscandoBody: Just so you know — most people here are looking for and finding a real relationship.
onboarding.infoIntentAmistadTitle: This is a great platform for you.
onboarding.infoIntentAmistadBody: You'll find people who are genuinely compatible with what you're looking for.
onboarding.step2Subtitle: Personality, not a LinkedIn profile. Tell us what that person is like.
onboarding.step2Hint: What matters isn't what they do, but who they are.
onboarding.step2Prompt1: How you'd like that person to be in their day-to-day
onboarding.step2Prompt2: What kind of character or personality attracts you
onboarding.step2Prompt3: How you'd like to feel with that person
onboarding.step2Prompt4: Something you know wouldn't work for you
onboarding.step2Placeholder: e.g. someone curious, with a sense of humor, who tells me things I don't know…
onboarding.step3Subtitle: Choose up to {max}. This weighs a lot in compatibility.
onboarding.step4Subtitle: What age range are you looking for in your match?
onboarding.step5Subtitle: Your province and city. This helps us find matches near you.
onboarding.step5LocationHint: The province and city where you currently live.
onboarding.step6Subtitle: Up to 6 photos. The first will be your main photo.
onboarding.step6BlurNote: Your photos are locked for your match until you've exchanged {count} messages each. No one sees them before.
onboarding.step6SwapHint: Tap another photo to swap it
onboarding.step6AddNote: You can select multiple photos at once. You can finish without photos and add them later.

day0.body1: We take our time choosing it carefully — no scrolling, no rush.
day0.body2: Good things come to those who wait. One day.
day0.notifBody: We'll let you know when your match arrives and when your conversation moves forward. No spam.

match.nextMatchBody: Meanwhile, keep refining your profile or answer today's question. The more you participate, the better your matches.

chats.emptySubtitle: When you start talking with your match it will appear here.
chats.unlockBanner: Send <one>1 message</one> each to see the name · <four>4 messages</four> to see photos and the full profile.

matchProfile.photosLocked: Photos unlock when each of you has sent at least {count} messages.

question.title: Daily question
question.upToDate: All caught up. A new question arrives tomorrow —
question.pendingNote: {count} pending questions · this is the oldest

profile.photoHint: Tap a photo to set it as your main photo.
profile.noPhotos: You haven't uploaded any photos yet.

settings.title: Account settings
settings.newPasswordHint: At least 8 characters and 1 uppercase letter
settings.deleteBody: All your data will be deleted and cannot be recovered. This action is irreversible.
settings.emailChangeSent: Check your email to confirm the change.

unmatch.title: Unmatch with {name}?
unmatch.subtitle: This action cannot be undone. Tell us why — it helps us find you better matches.
